purpose: Photoreal masked HISM billboard canopy for the South Fork American River production environment.

assets.generation_brief: Create a photorealistic-natural full mature Sierra foothill ponderosa pine specimen for an Unreal Engine vegetation billboard. Show the entire tree from roots to crown in a straight-on orthographic-like view, with realistic bark, branches, and needle clusters. Isolate it against a perfectly flat #ff00ff magenta chroma background. Use even neutral daylight, no cast shadow, no ground, no scenery, no frame, no text, and no other objects.

Create a photorealistic-natural mature California interior live oak specimen for an Unreal Engine vegetation billboard. Show the entire broad spreading tree from roots to canopy in a straight-on orthographic-like view, with realistic dark furrowed bark, branching, and dense small evergreen leaves. Isolate it against a perfectly flat #ff00ff magenta chroma background. Use even neutral daylight, no cast shadow, no ground, no scenery, no frame, no text, and no other objects.
